race.comment: AUDIO POP CAM (2) settled towards the tail when resuming last start then wound up strongly to score by a long neck over 1200m at this track. She looks to have come back very well and should be very hard to beat again. TOMMYESS (9) had a bit on his rivals last time with an impressive 4.5 lengths win over 1200m at this track in a Class 1. Up in grade now but rates right up to winning once more. HYPER BALLAD (11) impressed when successful on debut over 1100m at Pakenham Synthetic three weeks ago. Has upside and is well placed to feature again. BARK (6) sat on the pace and stuck on well to score by 0.8 lengths at today's track and trip last start in a far better run. Turns around quickly here and can take some holding out again.
